channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Humanity heating planet faster than ever before, study finds - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Humanity heating planet faster than ever before, study finds  The Guardian
  2. Scientists are trying to solve the mystery of whether global warming is speeding up. A new study says it has the answer  CNN
  3. Global Warming Has Significantly Accelerated  Bloomberg.com
  4. Pace of global warming has nearly doubled since 2015, reveals study  Carbon Brief
  5. The Last 10 Years of Climate Data Reveal Something Alarming  SciTechDaily

item.description:
1. 'City killer' asteroid will narrowly miss the moon, James Webb Telescope reveals  Live Science

  4. Asteroid 2024 YR4 will not impact the Moon  European Space Agency
  5. Good news for the moon: Famous asteroid 2024 YR4 won't smash into it in 2032  Space

item.description:
